name: XchangeByte
description: Next-generation exchange platform engineered for scalability and cloud-native deployment.
longDescription: XchangeByte is an exchange platform in active development, focused on scalable architecture, secure transactions, and a foundation ready for cloud-native deployment.

caseStudy.challenge: Design an exchange platform foundation that can scale securely from day one, without over-engineering before product-market fit.
caseStudy.solution: Starting with a TypeScript-first Next.js codebase, clear domain boundaries, and cloud-native deployment patterns planned from the architecture phase.
caseStudy.outcome: Active development at xchangebyte.com with architecture decisions documented before scale demands them.

architecture.summary: Modular exchange architecture being built for cloud-native deployment and secure transaction processing.

layers.name: Client
layers.role: Exchange UI, order flows, account management

layers.name: Services
layers.role: Order matching, wallet logic, API gateway (planned)
